MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-13-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2002 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-13-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Valerie L. Sharpe, Esq., LITTLER MENDELSON 433-1940, for defendant ADECCO NORTH AMERICA, LLC, moving for summary judgment
Stanley G. Hilton, Esq., 439-4893, for plaintiff DANIEL HALL and opposing party
* A R G U E D and tentative ruling adopted --
Defendant ADECCO EMPLOYMENT AGENCY's motion for summary judgment is GRANTED.
Request for CCP 437 c(h) continuance is DENIED. As to 1st cause of action
discrimination and 2nd cause of action wrongful termination -- no triable issue
re adverse employment action taken by defendant, 3rd cause of action breach of contact
and 4th cause of action breach of covenant of good faith and fair dealing --
plaintiff is an at will employee, 5th cause of action fraud, 6th cause of action
intentional infliction emotional distress and 7th cause of action negligent infliction
emotional distress -- no opposition filed, 8th cause of action hostile work environment
-- no triable issue of fact re: severe and pervasive conduct by defendant. Defendant's evidentiary objection to declarations of plaintiff is DENIED. (JJM/301/MD) Hon. JAMES J. McBRIDE, Court Reporter Eric Throne, CSR 7855

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-06-2002 Continued To Sep-13-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
